creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Allan Jude from comment #38)

Andreas managed to reproduce the issue with the patch (like predicted by avg and you), but it took days of hammering the system heavily.

@Allan/avg: Do you have an overview of all the possible code paths in which this interlock can happen? I didn't look closely at the code myself yet.

If it's just about reclaiming a vnode, we could just allow that to fail and either retry the operation or allow exceeding kern.maxvnodes temporarily (like in a kind of soft-fail scenario).
